title: Range Sum Query
prompt:
Given an integer array `nums` and a list of queries where each query is a pair `[i, j]`, return a list of the sum of elements between indices `i` and `j` (inclusive) for each query.

Use a prefix sum approach so that each query can be answered in O(1) time after an O(n) preprocessing step.

starterCode.typescript:
export function solve(nums: number[], queries: number[][]): number[] {
  
}

notesForAI.coreIdea: Build a prefix sum array where prefix[i] = sum of nums[0..i-1]. Then rangeSum(i, j) = prefix[j+1] - prefix[i]. This gives O(n) preprocessing and O(1) per query.
commonBugs: Off-by-one errors in prefix sum indexing (prefix array is length n+1)
Forgetting that query indices are inclusive on both ends
notesForAI.expectedComplexity: O(n + q) where n is array length and q is number of queries
